top_signals.title: Opening remarks by Commissioner Hoekstra at the High-Level Roundtable on Climate Resilience and Defence and Security
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 26 May 2026 Good morning and a warm welcome to all.
It is truly a pleasure to host all of you.
I had planned on being here with fellow Commissioner Andrius Kubilius but he ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
